purpose: HTML5 shell for the Phase 6 launcher page. Renders a yellow-on-black Aperture-themed 4-button picker (TEST CHAMBER 01 / 02 / 02 LEGACY / RANDOMIZE PROTOCOL) with subtitles and hotkey hints, the ENRICHMENT CENTER CREDITS panel (LOAD .TXT/CLEAR buttons, autosaving textarea with maxlength=20000, character counter, truncation notice, LOOP/STOP MODE radios), and the OVERRIDE TRACK panel (LOAD AUDIO FILE/RESET TO DEFAULT buttons, status line showing filename + duration, error pill, and WallpaperEngine-disabled pill). Each chamber button carries a data-target attribute consumed by launcher.js for navigation; the enrichment and override-track elements have stable ids consumed by launcher.js for localStorage and IndexedDB round-tripping. Loads launcher.css and launcher.js (script at end of body).
invariants: Each .chamber button must carry data-target (relative URL or the sentinel 'RANDOM') and data-key (lowercase single-character hotkey). launcher.js queries by both attributes.
Variant targets must include ?autoloop=1 so the destination cake.js arms the 5s splash auto-dismiss and the audio.ended transition.
Page is reachable as a sibling of portal/, portal2/, portal2/portal1style/; data-target relative URLs assume this layout.
The four hotkeys are 1, 2, 3, r — kept in sync with the [N] hint spans inside each button label.

Enrichment Center Credits element ids (#customCredits, #charCount, #truncNotice, #modeFieldset, #loadTxt, #txtPicker, #clearCredits, input[name='creditsMode']) are the contract surface with launcher.js — renames require launcher.js update.

Override Track element ids (#overrideTrack, #loadAudio, #audioPicker, #resetAudio, #audioStatus, #audioError, #weDisabled) are the contract surface with launcher.js — renames require launcher.js update.
The textarea has maxlength=20000 so the browser silently caps input; launcher.js detects the cap on paste via inputType+length and FileReader trims explicitly.
Audio picker accepts 'audio/*,.wav,.mp3,.ogg' — broad enough to cover the common formats users will try but constrained so non-audio files don't even appear in the native picker.
gotchas: RANDOMIZE PROTOCOL uses data-target="RANDOM" as a sentinel string, not a URL — launcher.js intercepts this value and picks a uniform-random variant URL.
There is no <noscript> fallback; if launcher.js fails to load the buttons do nothing.
The #cursor blinking span is content-driven by the launcher.css ::before pseudo-element; replacing it with a different cursor character requires touching CSS, not HTML.

MODE radios are inside <fieldset id='modeFieldset'> which launcher.js hides by toggling .hidden when textarea length reaches the 2,500-char STRETCH threshold; the radios still exist in the DOM so their value can still be read.

The Override Track section is greyed out (not removed) under ?we=1 — the .disabled class on #overrideTrack changes border + text color, and launcher.js sets disabled on both buttons and unhides #weDisabled. The section still renders so users know the feature exists but isn't usable in WallpaperEngine.
#audioError is a generic error pill — launcher.js writes failure messages into it (audio decode failure, IDB write failure, etc.). It defaults hidden.
Override Track's status line uses 'M:SS' formatting (e.g. '3:42') computed by formatDuration in launcher.js from the audio element's loadedmetadata event.
